destinations.evidence: Nodebuilder seeds async-context tx_hash from TxEnv before both inspect_replay and normal execution and preserves any preexisting tx_hash.
The TX_HASH precompile reads the metadata seeded by transact_raw, so trace replay and normal execution see the same hash context.
destinations.snippet:
let tx_hash = async_context
    .and_then(|ctx| ctx.async_context().metadata().tx_hash)
    .ok_or_else(|| PrecompileError::Other("Transaction hash not available in context".to_string()))?;
Ok(PrecompileOutput::new(TX_HASH_GAS, Bytes::from(tx_hash.as_slice().to_vec())))

destinations.evidence: Recovered signed transactions carry their intrinsic hash into TxEnv before EVM execution.
The dependency async context stores tx_hash metadata and factory contexts seed it consistently.

equivalence_argument: The invariant moved from a monolithic node executor into dependency checkouts: alloy-evm populates TxEnv.tx_hash, nodebuilder copies it into async context before inspect or transact without overwriting an existing hash, revm stores the metadata, and the TX_HASH precompile reads that metadata.
notes: The correct owner is the nodebuilder EVM wrapper and supporting alloy/revm context crates, not the port workspace.
rationale: The commit body explains debug_traceTransaction was missing async_context.metadata.tx_hash and diverging when TX_HASH precompile executed; the diff seeds tx_hash before inspect or regular execution while preserving any value already set by AsyncContextFactory. The primary merge adds an async-context-gated preamble in transact_raw that copies tx.tx_hash into async_context metadata when absent, matching the commit subject about propagating tx_hash during RitualEvm trace replay. Collapsed 2 closely related historical candidate statements into the latest effective formulation.
statement: When async-context is enabled and transact_raw receives a TxEnv with tx_hash set, RitualEvm should set that hash in async context metadata before either inspect_replay or normal transaction execution, but only if the context does not already have a tx_hash.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run a debug_traceTransaction replay of a transaction that calls the TX_HASH precompile through Scheduler and assert the trace succeeds and TX_HASH returns the transaction hash; also test an async context with a preexisting tx_hash is not overwritten.

Create a RitualEvm with empty async context metadata, call transact_raw in inspect mode with TxEnv.tx_hash set, and assert the async context metadata contains that hash before inspector/precompile logic reads it; repeat with metadata already set and assert it is not overwritten.
summary: Trace replay receives transaction hash context through nodebuilder dependencies.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run debug_traceTransaction for a transaction that invokes TX_HASH and assert it returns the transaction hash; repeat with preseeded async context metadata and assert transact_raw does not overwrite it.
title: Trace replay receives transaction hash context
